issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more

Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

issue.errorLine1: <string name="setup_password_pin_rejected">\u26A0 Numeric PINs are not allowed — use letters and symbols</string>
<string name="setup_password_common">\u26A0 This password is commonly used — pick something unique</string>
<string name="setup_password_requirements_hint">Use 8+ characters with 3 of: lowercase, uppercase, digits, symbols</string>
<string name="import_menu_photo_picker_description">Private picker — no gallery permission needed. Folder info is not preserved.</string>
<string name="path_maker_description">Photo Picker doesn\'t expose the original folder path. Pick which album these photos should go into.</string>
<string name="path_maker_warning">⚠ Photo Picker tidak menyimpan path asli. Pilih album tujuan.</string>
<string name="menu_restore_original_toast_nothing">Nothing to restore — originals are already local.</string>
<string name="settings_security_create_vault_summary">Add a separate vault protected by a different password</string>
<string name="settings_security_switch_vault_summary">Lock and unlock with another vault\'s password</string>
<string name="create_vault_description">Each vault is independent and unlocked only by its own password. New vaults start empty and do not sync to the cloud — they are local-only.</string>
<string name="create_vault_password_already_unlocks">This password already unlocks an existing vault. Pick a different password.</string>
<string name="create_vault_success">New vault created. Lock and unlock with this password to switch into it.</string>
<string name="create_vault_warning_local_only">⚠ This vault will not sync to the cloud and has no recovery phrase. If you forget the password, its contents cannot be recovered.</string>
<string name="sync_notification_channel_desc">Background upload of encrypted photos to your configured rclone remote.</string>

<string name="settings_category_cloud_sync_summary">Optional. Backs up your encrypted photos to a cloud remote you own (via rclone). Your existing PhotoZ encryption is not modified — the same encrypted bytes are copied to your remote.</string>
<string name="settings_cloud_sync_not_configured">Not configured — tap to import your rclone.conf file</string>
<string name="settings_cloud_sync_awaiting_choice">Config imported — tap to pick which remote to use</string>
<string name="settings_cloud_sync_invalid_no_sections">This doesn\'t look like a valid rclone config file</string>
<string name="sync_settings_import_io_error">Couldn\'t save the config file, try again</string>
<string name="settings_sync_auto_upload_summary">Upload new photos to your cloud backup as soon as they\'re imported. Turn off to upload manually.</string>
<string name="settings_sync_wifi_only_summary">Wait for an unmetered (Wi-Fi) connection before uploading. Avoids cellular data charges.</string>

<string name="settings_sync_delete_after_upload_summary">Remove the local encrypted original after a successful upload to free device storage. Thumbnails are kept so the gallery still shows the photo.</string>

<string name="settings_sync_verify_hash_summary">After each upload, re-download and re-hash the remote file to confirm it matches the local original. Slower (uses extra bandwidth) but catches silent corruption. Recommended for paranoiac users.</string>
<string name="settings_cleanup_backup_summary">Reclaim cloud space by repacking thumbnail packs and deleting originals for photos you\'ve removed. Safe to run any time.</string>
<string name="settings_cleanup_backup_toast_success">Cleaned up backup — repacked %1$d pack(s), deleted %2$d original(s)</string>
<string name="settings_cleanup_backup_toast_nothing">Nothing to clean up — no deleted photos to reclaim.</string>
<string name="settings_clean_cached_originals_summary">Delete cached encrypted originals (.crypt) from local storage. Photos stay safe on the remote and can be re-downloaded on demand.</string>
<string name="settings_clean_cached_originals_toast_nothing">Nothing to clean — no cached originals found.</string>
<string name="sync_remote_picker_title">Pick a remote to use for backup</string>
<string name="sync_remote_picker_subtitle">Found %1$d remote(s) in your config. Pick which one PhotoZ should back up to.</string>
<string name="sync_settings_choose_remote_failed">Couldn\'t set the chosen remote, try again</string>
<string name="repo_setup_needs_config">A cloud backup remote is required to use PhotoZ. Import your rclone.conf file to continue.</string>
<string name="repo_setup_pick_remote">Pick which remote to use for backup</string>
<string name="repo_setup_ready_to_register">No backup repo exists on this remote yet. A new repo will be created.</string>
<string name="gallery_open_file_failed">Couldn\'t open file — no app available, or vault is locked</string>

<string name="repo_setup_no_escrow_body">Recovery phrase restore is not available for this repo (it was created before this feature existed). You can still use the gallery, but to enable recovery-phrase restore, you would need to re-register the repo.</string>
<string name="repo_setup_password_entry_subtitle">Enter your vault password to restore your backup</string>
<string name="repo_setup_password_hint">Enter your vault password (existing repo) or a new password (new repo)</string>
<string name="settings_category_backup_summary">Export your vault\'s decrypted photos to a plain ZIP file, or import them back. The ZIP is not encrypted — pick a safe location.</string>
<string name="settings_backup_export_zip_summary">Save all photos as a plain (unencrypted) ZIP archive. Choose a secure location.</string>
<string name="settings_backup_import_zip_summary">Restore photos from a ZIP archive previously created by Export. Re-encrypts and adds them to the vault.</string>
<string name="settings_backup_export_zip_toast_failed">ZIP export failed. Check the chosen location and try again.</string>
<string name="settings_backup_import_zip_toast_nothing">No new photos found in ZIP (all already in vault).</string>
<string name="settings_backup_import_zip_toast_failed">ZIP import failed. Make sure the file is a valid PhotoZ export.</string>
<string name="settings_trash_summary">Browse, restore, or permanently delete photos you\'ve removed. Items are auto-purged after 30 days.</string>
<string name="settings_trash_count_summary">%1$d item(s) in trash. Tap to manage.</string>
<string name="trash_empty_hint">Deleted photos show up here for 30 days before being permanently removed.</string>
<string name="trash_empty_confirm_message">All photos in the trash will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.</string>
<string name="trash_empty_failed">Failed to empty trash. Please try again.</string>
<string name="trash_restore_failed">Failed to restore photo. Please try again.</string>
<string name="trash_delete_permanent_failed">Failed to delete photo. Please try again.</string>
<string name="trash_delete_permanent_confirm_message">\"%1$s\" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.</string>
<string name="view_photo_slideshow_summary">Auto-advance through photos every 5 seconds. Tap to pause.</string>
<string name="settings_storage_refresh_summary">Re-scan local files and recompute the totals above.</string>

issue.message: "album" is a common misspelling; did you mean "álbum"?
Repeated word "kelime" in message: possible typo
"camera" is a common misspelling; did you mean "câmera"?
"Camera" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Câmera"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="recovery_phrase_restore_camera_permission_rationale">Camera permission is required to scan QR codes.</string> <!-- TODO -->
android.util.Log.e("CrashLogger", "FAILED to write crash log", e)
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "DialLauncher: PANIC CODE detected — initiating wipe")
android.util.Log.d("RcloneDiag", "DialLauncher: unrecognized code '$dialedCode' — showing fake crash")
} catch (e: Exception) { android.util.Log.e(TAG, "[HashRegistry] diag write FAILED: ${e.message}", e) }
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "PanicWipe: INITIATED — wiping all local vault data")
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "[UploadWorker] init: instance constructed by HiltWorkerFactory (class=${this.javaClass.name})")
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "detectRepo: classifying as NOT_INITIALIZED (dir not found)")
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "detectRepo: classifying as ERROR (not a dir-not-found error)")
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "detectRepo: marker not in listing → NOT_INITIALIZED")
android.util.Log.e("SyncLogger", "FAILED to write sync log", e)
android.util.Log.e("RcloneDiag", "[SyncRestorer] restoreAllOriginals: failed to query photos: ${e.message}", e)

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="import_sharted_question">Do you want to import %1$d file(s)?</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("photo"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("thumbnail"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("original"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("original"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: Are you sure, you want to delete %1$d file(s)?

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: Are you sure, you want to export %1$d file(s), back to your gallery?

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: Are you sure, you want to export %1$d file(s), back to your gallery and delete them?

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("cached"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("remote"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("photos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("photo"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_trash_count_summary">%1$d item(s) in trash. Tap to manage.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("photo"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("file"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("total"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

This broadcast receiver declares an intent-filter for a protected broadcast action string, which can only be sent by the system, not third-party applications. However, the receiver's onReceive method does not appear to call getAction to ensure that the received Intent's action string matches the expected value, potentially making it possible for another actor to send a spoofed intent with no action string or a different action string and cause undesired behavior. In this case, it is possible that the onReceive method passed the received Intent to another method that checked the action string. If so, this finding can safely be ignored.
issue.errorLine1: override fun onReceive(context: Context?, intent: Intent?) {

issue.message: The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and the default allows backup
Very long vector path (4610 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp

Use the KTX extension function `Int.toDrawable` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Context.withStyledAttributes` instead?

Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_chevron_right"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_chevron_right"` to better support right-to-left layouts
